root_text.sn34.20-27:1.4: Idha, bhikkhave, ekacco jhāyī samādhismiṁ ṭhitikusalo hoti, na samādhismiṁ vuṭṭhānakusalo.
root_text.sn34.20-27:1.5: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco jhāyī samādhismiṁ vuṭṭhānakusalo hoti, na samādhismiṁ ṭhitikusalo.
root_text.sn34.20-27:1.6: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco jhāyī neva samādhismiṁ ṭhitikusalo hoti, na ca samādhismiṁ vuṭṭhānakusalo.
root_text.sn34.20-27:1.7: Idha pana, bhikkhave, ekacco jhāyī samādhismiṁ ṭhitikusalo ca hoti, samādhismiṁ vuṭṭhānakusalo ca.
root_text.sn34.20-27:1.11: (Purimamūlakāni viya yāva sattavīsatimā ṭhitimūlakasappāyakārīsuttā aṭṭha suttāni pūretabbāni.)

translation_text.sn34.20-27:0.3: Eight on Remaining and Emergence, Etc.
translation_text.sn34.20-27:1.4: One meditator is skilled in remaining in immersion but not in emerging from it. …”
translation_text.sn34.20-27:1.11: (These eight discourses should be told in full as the previous set.)
